mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment_like (comment_id, user_id, created_at) VALUES (#{commentId}, #{userId}, NOW())
INSERT IGNORE INTO comment_like (comment_id, user_id, created_at) VALUES (#{commentId}, #{userId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM comment_like WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment_like WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND user_id = #{userId}
